pull_requests.title: Add --use-v2-parser to delegate parsing to the fusion parser
pull_requests.body:
## Summary

Adds an opt-in `--use-v2-parser` flag that delegates parsing to the fusion parser (`fs parse`) instead of running dbt-core's own parser. fs writes `manifest.json` (and, when produced, `semantic_manifest.json`) to a temp handoff directory; dbt-core then loads the manifest, builds a runtime `Manifest`, and continues with the rest of the command.

This is hidden/experimental for v1 and changes no behavior unless `--use-v2-parser` is set.

## Behavior

- `--use-v2-parser` (env `DBT_ENGINE_USE_V2_PARSER`, also settable under `flags:` in `dbt_project.yml`): toggle.
- `--v2-parser` (env `DBT_ENGINE_V2_PARSER`, defaults to `fs parse`): command invoked. Supports custom subcommands/wrappers (split via `shlex`), e.g. `uv run fs parse`.
- Forwarded flags to fs: `--project-dir`, `--profiles-dir`, `--profile`, `--target`, `--target-path`, `--vars`, `--packages-install-path`.
- fs runs into a temp handoff dir, not the project's `target/`, so we can distinguish "fs exited 0 but wrote nothing" from "stale manifest from a prior run", and `--no-write-json` doesn't leak files.
- When `write_json` is set, the handoff `manifest.json` (and `semantic_manifest.json` if present) is copied into the project's target dir. Plugin-produced manifest artifacts are also written.
- Stale `partial_parse.msgpack` from a prior non-fusion run is removed on fusion entry; partial parsing is disabled when `USE_V2_PARSER` is set (`read_manifest_for_partial_parse` early-exits).
- `write_manifest` is a full no-op in v2 mode — fs's artifacts are canonical; we don't want to re-serialize from the runtime Manifest and clobber them.

## Key files

- `core/dbt/parser/fusion.py` (new) — `parse_with_fusion(runtime_config, write, write_json)`. Shells out to fs, loads the resulting manifest via `WritableManifest.read_and_check_versions`, converts to runtime `Manifest`, calls `build_flat_graph`, runs `assert_no_get_nodes_plugins` (incompatible plugin hook) and `enrich_manifest_with_plugin_artifacts` (mirroring the tail of `parse_manifest`).
- `core/dbt/cli/requires.py` — fusion branch in `setup_manifest` calls `parse_with_fusion(...)` then `_wire_adapter_for_external_manifest` (registers adapter, sets macro resolver / query header).
- `core/dbt/parser/manifest.py` — adds `enrich_manifest_with_plugin_artifacts` helper (also reused by `parse_manifest`), `assert_no_get_nodes_plugins`, and the partial-parse / `write_manifest` guards.
- `core/dbt/cli/params.py`, `core/dbt/contracts/project.py`, `core/dbt/cli/main.py` — flag wiring (CLI, env var, project flag).
- `core/dbt/exceptions.py` — typed errors: `FusionParserMissingError` (binary not found), `FusionParserError` (non-zero exit / missing output), `FusionParserSchemaError` (bad JSON), `FusionParserVersionError` (incompatible schema version).
- `core/dbt/artifacts/resources/v1/singular_test.py` — schema tweak required for fs's serialization.

## Testing

- Unit tests for argv translation, vars serialization, stale-msgpack cleanup, missing binary / non-zero exit / missing output / bad JSON / incompatible schema, and `write_json` copy behavior (`tests/unit/parser/test_fusion.py`).
- Unit tests for plugin enrichment helper and `get_nodes` plugin rejection (`tests/unit/parser/test_fusion_plugin_enrichment.py`).
- Flag/env var/project-flag plumbing (`tests/unit/cli/test_flags.py`).
- `setup_manifest` branching: fusion vs non-fusion vs pre-set manifest (`tests/unit/cli/test_setup_manifest.py`).
- Singular-test artifact discrimination (`tests/unit/artifacts/test_test_node_discrimination.py`).
- Functional fusion-parser branch coverage (`tests/functional/fusion_parser/test_fusion_parser_branch.py`).
- A v2-parser parity harness (`tests/functional/v2_parser_parity/`) that re-runs select functional tests through the v2 path using a "v2 self-parser" shim, plus a README documenting the framework.
- Updated existing functional basics/compile tests to run under both parsers.

## Notes / follow-ups

- Output capture is passthrough: fs inherits stdout/stderr. The TODO in `_run_fusion` outlines the move to `Popen` + structured-log streaming once fs ships its JSON log format.
- `--v2-parser` and `--use-v2-parser` are hidden flags. Naming is intentional (drops `command` per internal review).
- Errors from fs schema mismatches are raised with typed exceptions so callers / tooling can disambiguate.

pull_requests.title: Implement dbt Login Command
pull_requests.body:
Resolves #13032 


### Problem
context: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core/issues/13032

### Solution
- Add Auth chain with resolvers -> Env -> Passive Oauth -> Platform -> Interactive Oauth
- Add oauth utilities that enable authentication with dbt platform and runcache
- Add platform api client that resolves enabled features in dbt platform
- Define login task that invokes auth chain
- Add flag `--skip-browser-auth` for dbt login command
- Add dbt login status sub command that shows the kind and detail about authentication method

- [x] I have read [the contributing guide](https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and understand what's expected of me.
